/// <reference types="node" /> import { Readable } from 'stream'; import { Task } from '../managers/tasks'; import ReaderStream from '../readers/stream'; import { ReaderOptions } from '../types'; import Provider from './provider'; export default class ProviderStream extends Provider<Readable> { protected _reader: ReaderStream; read(task: Task): Readable; api(root: string, task: Task, options: ReaderOptions): Readable; }
